PCP_FLAG 

Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
ACO Pioneer V2 Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.1 14 

PCP_FLAG 

LABEL: Primary Care Practitioner Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: An indicator of whether the participating provider was considered a primary care specialist for 
purposes of applying exclusivity rules. 

SHORT NAME: PCP_FLAG 

LONG NAME: PCP_FLAG 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS Participating Provider Pioneer ACO RIF 

VALUES: N = non-primary care specialist 
 Y =
